title: Purpliness
description: Purple shaders, modifies some stuff to be purple
body:
## Purpliness
As the name suggests, these are purple shaders, they change a lot of stuff to be purple. Nothing too fancy, just a lot of purple and some cool shadows.
Features: 
- Purple sky
- Purple clouds
- Purple shadows
- Purple water
- Purple fog

![demo](https://github.com/Anvarys/purpliness/blob/master/images/demo.png?raw=true)
